description: Second-pass re-run on same C4 data — repeated exposure test for slow CMS levels (L2/L3). Loads GPU1 25K checkpoint (warm outer-loop params + M_l context from end of first pass) and replays the same C4/sharegpt data from position 0. Tests whether a better-trained retrieval mechanism unlocks structure the first pass missed. Task: task_6b7c8f. See also: task_fd444d (first-pass run).
notes: IMPORTANT — cursor sidecar: do NOT copy checkpoints/gate_warmup_diagnostic_gpu1.safetensors.cursor.json alongside the checkpoint. Its absence triggers automatic data reset to position 0 (loop.py: 'warm-start, data position reset to 0'). Copying the sidecar would resume from the END of the C4 stream, not replay from the beginning. Cold M variant (reset_context after load) requires a reset_context config flag not yet implemented — track as follow-on if warm M results are interesting.
